title: Stretch the Smile
goal: Hear and pronounce long /iː/ without reading it as the letter E.
tip: Smile slightly, keep the sound long: ii.

title: Quick Little I
goal: Separate /ɪ/ from Vietnamese i by making it shorter and softer.
tip: Do not stretch the sound. Say it quickly.

title: Bright E
goal: Use a clean /e/ sound in common beginner words.
tip: Keep the mouth relaxed and clear.

title: Wide Cat Sound
goal: Open the mouth wider for /æ/ instead of saying Vietnamese 'a'.

title: Blue Moon /uː/
goal: Round the lips and hold /uː/ clearly.
tip: Hold uu for a little longer.

title: Tiny Schwa
goal: Notice weak /ə/ sounds that Vietnamese learners often over-pronounce.
tip: Say ơ very lightly, almost like a shadow.

title: Ch Rocket
goal: Make /tʃ/ crisp and stronger than Vietnamese ch.
tip: Start with a tiny t, then release ch.

title: Tongue Air
goal: Practice /θ/ with air and no voice.
tip: Put the tongue gently between the teeth.

title: Tongue Voice
goal: Practice /ð/ with tongue position and vibration.
tip: Same tongue as /θ/, but turn your voice on.
